title: Stir-Fried Ackee with Crunchy Fermentation
description: A Chinese-inspired dish featuring the unique flavors of ackee, crunchy texture, and fermented notes.

ingredients.name: Fermented
ingredients.notes: Soy sauce or fermented bean paste

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add ackee and stir-fry until tender.
Add crunchy fermented vegetables and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add fermented soy sauce or bean paste and stir-fry for an additional minute.
